records.ety: [Maori kaka a parrot; -- so named from its note.]

defs: A New Zealand parrot of the genus Nestor, especially the brown parrot (Nestor meridionalis).
notes: ☞ The mountain kaka, or kea (Nestor notabilis), is remarkable for having recently acquired carnivorous habits. It attacks and kills lambs and pigs, sometimes doing great damage.
